concerns.text: FR-008 requires the permutation test to continue iterating until p-value standard error < 0.001 (or max [deferred] iterations). Task T026 only specifies a minimum of 1,000 iterations, omitting the dynamic convergence criterion required to satisfy the spec.

FR-011 requires the system to 'flag' any predictors with VIF ≥ 5. Task T021 mentions calculating VIF but lacks an explicit task to implement the flagging logic or generate the required warning output artifact.

Spec Edge Cases explicitly require handling instrument version transitions (e.g., ACE SWICS vs. SWICS-2) via calibration offsets. Task T015 covers data gaps and zero-velocity floors but omits the specific task to implement or document version-transition logic.

FR-010 requires applying Benjamini-Hochberg FDR correction. While T027 mentions FDR, T028 (the final reporting task) does not explicitly include aggregating or reporting the FDR-corrected p-values as a distinct output, risking the omission of this critical success criterion.
